steps.title: Identify the key defining phrase
steps.content: The strongest clue is “A void and silent space between two worlds.” The speaker directly equates the void with a “silent space” — an empty gap or interval.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
“Empty” directly expresses the meaning of the “silent space” in the passage — a gap where inspiration and feeling are absent. “Useless” contradicts the passage (the void enables gathering strength), and “forgotten” and “incomplete” introduce unsupported concepts.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
